task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the operations brief to understand the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ops_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent creates an inclusion geofence polygon with the required minimum number of vertices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a geofence polygon (typically green or blue) drawn on the map with at least 5 distinct vertices.

task_completion.description: Agent creates an exclusion geofence zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing an exclusion zone (typically a red polygon or circle) drawn on the map.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the required emergency rally points to the plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing at least 2 Rally Point markers (often indicated by 'R' icons) placed on the map.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the specific flight controller safety parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters menu showing 'FENCE_ACTION' set to 1 and 'RTL_ALT' set to 2500.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the geofence and rally point plan to the required file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager confirmation in QGroundControl showing the plan being saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/safety_fence.plan'.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl graphical interface to create the geofence and rally points.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the QGroundControl application window, not just a text editor writing a .plan JSON file.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl parameter editor to change safety settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QGroundControl Parameters screen being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent saved the plan using QGroundControl's built-in save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action should be visible via QGroundControl's 'File' or 'Sync' menu (e.g., 'Save to File...'), rather than manually moving or echoing files in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure an inclusion geofence with at least 5 vertices, an exclusion zone, and at least 2 rally points in QGroundControl. The flight controller parameters must be set to FENCE_ACTION=1 and RTL_ALT=2500. The final plan must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/safety_fence.plan.
